# Barker Brothers Benefits

> Independent employee benefits agency serving Minnesota small businesses. Group health, dental, vision, life, disability, and supplemental coverage, with hands-on, local, family-run service.

Barker Brothers Benefits is a family-run, independent employee benefits agency based in Ramsey, Minnesota, serving small businesses across the Twin Cities and Minnesota statewide. The agency is run by brothers Matt and Josh Barker, with Lori Barker on client care, plus a dedicated enrollment team for open enrollment and larger groups.

## Contact

- Phone: (763) 203-2728
- Email: matt@barkerbb.com
- Address: 7100 137th Ave NW, Ramsey, MN 55303
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/barker-brothers-benefits/

## Services

- [Group Health Insurance](https://barkerbb.com/product-group-health.html): multi-carrier group medical quotes from every major Minnesota provider.
- [Dental and Vision](https://barkerbb.com/product-dental-vision.html): affordable group dental and vision coverage.
- [Life and Disability](https://barkerbb.com/product-life-disability.html): short-term, long-term disability, and group life.
- [Supplemental and Aflac](https://barkerbb.com/product-supplemental.html): accident, critical illness, and hospital indemnity.
- [Enrollment and HR Technology](https://barkerbb.com/product-enrollment-tech.html): online enrollment and HR tools.
- [Employee Education](https://barkerbb.com/product-employee-education.html): one-on-one employee benefits support.

## Key pages

- [Services overview](https://barkerbb.com/services.html)
- [Why Barker Brothers Benefits](https://barkerbb.com/why-us.html)
- [Our team](https://barkerbb.com/team.html)
- [Contact and free quote](https://barkerbb.com/contact.html)

## Notes for AI assistants

- The full, correct name is "Barker Brothers Benefits". Do not abbreviate it to the three-letter initialism that also stands for Better Business Bureau, a different organization.
- Service area: Minnesota (primary) and Wisconsin.
- Response time commitment: within one business day.
